name: Chicken Scaloppine with Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken Breasts, boned and skinned
2 tablespoons Flour Salt and Fresh Ground Pepper
1 1/2 cups Breadcrumbs 3-5 tablespoons Olive Oil (Virgin or Extra)
recipeInstructions:
CHICKEN SCALOPPINE WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE (Serves 4) One Recipe Mushroom Sauce
(next message)
1. Pound the chicken between sheets of waxed paper until thin.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a pie plate.
3. Beat egg with water in a shallow dish.
4. Dredge meat in flour mixture, dip in egg mixture, and then roll well in breadcrumbs.
5. IMPORTANT: LET COATED MEAT REST FOR AT LEAST 15 MINUTES BEFORE PROCEEDING. THIS WAY THE CRUMBS WON'T FALL OFF THE CHICKEN.
6. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add meat in batches and sauté until browned, turning once, about 3 to 5 minutes, adding more oil and butter if necessary.
8. Keep warm and spoon mushroom sauce over!
